scripts.check:source: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer.js && node --check scripts/preflight-build.js && python -c "import ast,pathlib; [ast.parse(pathlib.Path(f).read_text(encoding='utf-8'), filename=f) for f in ['backend.py','backend_runner.py','config.py']]"
scripts.build:backend: py -3.12 -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --onefile --name backend --distpath dist --workpath build backend_runner.py || python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --onefile --name backend --distpath dist --workpath build backend_runner.py
scripts.dist:with-backend: npm run preflight:build && npm run close:packaging && npm run clean:packaging && npm run build:backend && npm run dist
scripts.dist:client: npm run preflight:build && npm run build:backend && npm run package:desktop
scripts.dist:production: npm run build:server && npm run package:server && npm run dist:client
